title: juniperus squamata subsp. wilsonii
intro: Juniperus squamata subsp. wilsonii is a sub-species of the evergreen coniferous tree, scientifically known as a type of juniper, native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Juniperus squamata subsp. wilsonii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, and help in reducing fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, essential oils, and infusions that can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
